rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. blue-black homogeneous pigmentation occupying >50% of lesion area; 2. elevated nodular component with dome-shaped or polypoid morphology; 3. absence of typical benign nevus patterns (comma vessels, symmetric globular pattern, or uniform brown pigment network)
rules.rationale: Blue-black homogeneous areas represent heavily pigmented melanoma cells in the dermis with overlying orthokeratosis; this pattern is rare in benign nevi and when combined with nodular elevation meets the 'E' (Elevation) criterion of the EFG rule for nodular melanoma
rules.description: Blue-black homogeneous pattern with symmetrical nodular architecture indicating nodular melanoma

rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. milky-red or pink-white structureless areas comprising the dominant lesion color; 2. polymorphous vessels including at least two of: dotted vessels, linear-irregular vessels, or milky-red globules/lacunae; 3. firm nodular elevation meeting EFG criteria (Elevation above skin surface, Firm on palpation, Growth >1 month)
rules.rationale: Milky-red structureless zones result from neoangiogenesis and tumor-associated inflammation in amelanotic nodular melanoma; polymorphous vascular patterns reflect disorganized tumor vasculature distinct from the monomorphous comma or dotted vessels seen in dermal nevi
rules.description: Milky-red areas with polymorphous vascular pattern indicating amelanotic or hypomelanotic nodular melanoma

rules.condition: [Patch rule - melanoma_vs_melanocytic_nevus] 1. ulceration, erosion, or blood crusting not attributable to documented trauma; 2. irregular or linear-irregular vessels at lesion periphery or within structureless areas; 3. asymmetric pigmentation pattern OR blue-white veil over raised portion of lesion
rules.rationale: Spontaneous ulceration indicates rapid vertical growth phase tumor outstripping blood supply, a hallmark of nodular melanoma aggressiveness; combined with atypical vessels and asymmetry or blue-white veil, this triad achieves high specificity as benign nevi virtually never ulcerate spontaneously
rules.description: Atypical vascular pattern with ulceration or erosion in a nodular lesion indicating advanced nodular melanoma
